title: CrossRepoEscalation
description: Schema for cross-repository issue escalation records. Tracks framework-level issues detected in consuming repositories that are escalated to the dark-forge upstream repository.

escalation_id.description: Unique identifier for this escalation record (e.g., esc-a1b2c3d4).

source_repository.description: Consuming repository in owner/repo format where the issue was detected.

source_issue_number.description: The local issue number in the consuming repo that triggered escalation. Null if detected outside an issue context.

target_repository.description: Upstream repository to escalate to (e.g., convergent-systems-co/dark-forge).

type.description: Category of detection criteria that matched.

detail.description: Specific detail about what was detected (e.g., file path, error message, missing policy rule).

affected_files.description: Files in the .ai/ governance directory that are affected.

error_output.description: Relevant error output or log excerpt from the failure.

dedup_key.description: Hash of (detection_criteria.type + detection_criteria.detail) used for duplicate prevention. Embedded in upstream issue body as <!-- dedup:{key} --> marker.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the consuming repo's agent detected.

upstream_issue_number.description: Issue number created in the target repository. Null until escalation completes.

status.description: Current status of the escalation. 'detected' = identified but not yet escalated. 'escalated' = upstream issue created. 'duplicate' = upstream issue already exists. 'resolved' = upstream fix merged. 'skipped' = rate-limited or disabled.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the escalation was detected.

resolved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the upstream issue was resolved. Null until resolved.
